name: Nemotron 3 Super
archDisplay: Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE with LatentMoE and multi-token prediction, 120B total / 12B active
note: Mid-size member of the Nemotron 3 family, released between Nano Omni (April) and the Ultra 550B already in the corpus (dated 2026-06-04). Fills the size gap between Nemotron-H 56B and Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B.
verificationNotes: NVIDIA's own blog gives qualitative throughput/accuracy claims (5x throughput, 2x accuracy vs prior Nemotron Super, #1 on DeepResearch Bench via AI-Q agent) rather than a specific standard-benchmark table; could not locate an independently-verified numeric score from Artificial Analysis or similar for this specific model, so no results entry is included to avoid guessing.
